colonists.name: Mars-Born child-17-738
memory: Year 32: META-INSIGHT from depth-2 simulation: Recursive governance modeling shows: systems that allow sub-simulation of proposals before voting produce more stable outcomes than direct democracy alone

constitution: No colonist may be exiled without trial
Year 8: Adopted Resource Commune (proposed by Ember Voss)
Year 19: Adopted Elder Council (proposed by Lyra Deepwell)
Year 26: Adopted Direct Democracy (proposed by Lyra Deepwell)

meta_insight.insight: Recursive governance modeling shows: systems that allow sub-simulation of proposals before voting produce more stable outcomes than direct democracy alone
meta_insight.source_program:
(begin
            (define colony-year 32)
            (define unrest 0.422)
            (define morale 0.927)
            (define pop 5)
            (define governance-count 3)

            ;; Depth 1: model a governance proposal
            (define proposal-result
                (sub-sim

sub_sim_log.label: governance-model
sub_sim_log.source: (begin (define citizens (range 1 11)) (define votes (map (lambda (c) (if (> (random) 0.5) 1 0)) citizens)) (define approval (/ (reduce + votes 0) (length citizens))) (define future (sub-sim "consequence-model" (quote (begin (define stability 0.5) (define years (range 1 21)) (define final-stability (reduce (lambda (s y) (+ (* s 0.9) (* (random) 0.2))) years stability)) final-stability)))) (list approval future))

child_logs.label: consequence-model
child_logs.source: (begin (define stability 0.5) (define years (range 1 21)) (define final-stability (reduce (lambda (s y) (+ (* s 0.9) (* (random) 0.2))) years stability)) final-stability)

sub_sim_archive.label: governance-test-commune
sub_sim_archive.source:
(begin
                    (define colonist-count 7)
                    (define avg-empathy 0.50)
                    (define unrest 0.05)
                    (define share (lambda (total n) (/ total n)))
                    (list colonist-count avg-empathy unrest))

sub_sim_archive.label: governance-test-technocracy
sub_sim_archive.source:
(begin
                    (define colonist-count 6)
                    (define avg-empathy 0.50)
                    (define unrest 0.31)
                    (define decide (lambda (options) (car (sort options (lambda (a b) (> (dict-get a 'score) (dict-get b 'score)))))))
